name: nsfocus-ads-v4-5-r90-f06
description: OctoBus package for NSFOCUS ADS V4.5R90F06 blacklist block and unblock APIs.

Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90F06.Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90.name: block-ip
Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90F06.Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90.description: Add an IP address to the NSFOCUS ADS blacklist.

Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90F06.Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90.name: unblock-ip
Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90F06.Nsfcous_ADS_V45R90.description: Remove an IP address from the NSFOCUS ADS blacklist.
